WHAT MPS CAN DO

How I can help you

What I can Do

In Westminster

I can raise matters which impact the constituency on your behalf in Westminster, by writing to relevant departments or officials on your behalf

In Coventry

I can contact both Coventry City Council as well as local organisations and private companies to try and help you resolve your issues

What I can't Do

In Westminster

As a Whip, I can’t make speeches in the House of Commons, table questions to Ministers, or sign Early Day Motions

In Coventry

I can’t help settle disputes between family members, neighbours, or between you and an employer

I can’t provide financial or business advice

I can’t give legal advice or interfere in court cases or any decisions previously made in a court of law

Facing an issue?

help & advice

MENTAL HEALTH

HOUSING

HEALTHCARE

DOMESTIC ABUSE

BENEFITS

IMMIGRATION

FOOD INSECURITY

OLDER PEOPLE

YOUNG PEOPLE

LEGAL ADVICE

UTILITIES

TRANSPORT

EDUCATION

NEURODIVERSITY

CRIME

Coventry City Council

If the issue you are raising relates to housing or council tax I would recommend contacting one of your ward councillors at Coventry City Council. 

Citizen's Advice Bureau

A national organisation that offer confidential advice and support on a range of issues – online, over the phone, and in person, for free.

the independent office for police conduct

IOPC oversee the police complaints system in England and Wales.

West Midlands Police

Here you can find your local officer, get the latest crime statistics and advice, and help the police with appeals for information. 

more support

As your MP, I want to ensure I represent you in any way I can. If the issue you are dealing with doesn’t relate to any of the topics above, these organisations may be able to help.

Help in coventry

let’s talk

Book one of my surgery appointments

If you want to book an appointment to discuss any issues that matter to you that I can help with, please complete the form below.

Contact us

This is the official website of Taiwo Owatemi, MP for Coventry North West.

Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To find out if I am your MP click here.

Want to know what MPs actually get up to?

Sign up to my newsletter to receive monthly updates on the work that I’ve been doing in the constituency and in Westminster. I also provide updates on key Government policies so you can keep up to date on that too!
